puzzleDescription: Use a switch statement to convert a numeric input (1–12) into its corresponding Month name.
objective: Input a number from 1 to 12 and print the month name (e.g., 1 = January, 12 = December).
hints: Create a switch(month) block with 12 cases.
Case 1 is 'January', Case 2 is 'February', and so on.
Ensure all month names are capitalized correctly (e.g., May).
